summary: Iteration 157 - Service Box Admin and Service Catalog Testing. All 22 backend tests PASSED. Frontend testing verified Care page Service Catalog with dynamic pricing and Admin Service Box CRUD operations.
critical_code_review_comments: Service Box Admin (service_box_routes.py): Full CRUD working - Create, Read, Update, Delete (archive), Toggle status, Clone
Stats endpoint returns correct totals: total=89, active=87, bookable=72, free=14, consultation=14, emergency_24x7=5
Pillar filter working correctly - filters services by pillar (care, travel, adopt, etc.)
Service Catalog (service_catalog_routes.py): Public endpoints working - list services, get single service
Price Calculator correctly applies all modifiers: city (Mumbai=1.15x), pet_size (Large=1.3x), pet_count (2 pets=1.8x)
Add-ons correctly added to total price
Frontend ServiceCatalogSection.jsx: 12 service cards displayed on Care page with data-testid attributes
Price modal shows all modifiers and calculates correctly (₹800 × 1.15 × 1.3 × 1.8 = ₹2,152.8)
seed_data_creation: Created test service TEST-SVC-* for CRUD testing (auto-cleaned after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Box Admin and Service Catalog fully tested. 89 services across 14 pillars. Price calculator working with city/size/count modifiers. Admin can create, edit, toggle, clone, and archive services.
